ItacAcademyItem.Name: Cavalieri dell`Iride (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: One publication is related to this Academy, but it is not held in British Library collections: Li cavalieri dell`Iride (Roma, Angelo Bernabo`, 1684)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
